event: Scenes of a Wedding Celebration (Cassone Panel)
description: A long horizontal decorative panel (cassone front) depicting an elaborate Renaissance wedding celebration or civic festivity. The scene shows numerous figures in richly colored costumes arranged in groups across the composition, set under a striped canopy or awning. From left to right: an architectural interior with seated figures, a central area with dancers and musicians, and figures in procession. The clothing is elaborate with long gowns, pointed hats, and colorful textiles. The style is characteristic of a 15th-century Florentine marriage chest (cassone) painting.
